labelsKo: 전체 장비 설정 간 1:1 비교 아님
summary.primaryConclusion: High unmatched count is expected for this fixture set because the MD-CLI target is a partial feature-split target, but port/LAG/SAP rename mapping and service parent matching also need matcher or manual-map work.

byReason.key: target object has no source counterpart
